annotations.description: defines the ingress related annotations, consumed mostly by the ingress controller

url.description: configures the URL to reach an external Keycloak. The "host" field supports templating (e.g., {{ .Release.Namespace }}).

protocol.description: defines the protocol used for Keycloak URL (e.g., https).

host.description: defines the hostname for Keycloak. Supports templating (e.g., {{ .Release.Namespace }}).

multiregion.description: Multi-region configuration for the Orchestration cluster. WARNING: get your configuration reviewed by Camunda before going to production — see https://docs.camunda.io/docs/self-managed/concepts/multi-region/dual-region/.

regions.description: Number of regions this Camunda Platform instance is stretched across.

regionId.description: Unique id of the region. MUST start at 0 for the computation to work correctly. With 2 regions, you would have region 0 and 1.

valueFrom.description: Source for the environment variable's value (Kubernetes EnvVarSource).

fieldRef.description: Selects a field of the pod (supports metadata.name, metadata.namespace, metadata.uid, metadata.labels['<KEY>'], metadata.annotations['<KEY>'], spec.nodeName, spec.serviceAccountName, status.hostIP, status.podIP, status.podIPs).

resourceFieldRef.description: Selects a resource of the container (only resources limits and requests are currently supported).

configMapKeyRef.description: Selects a key of a ConfigMap.

secretKeyRef.description: Selects a key of a Secret.

replicas.description: (DEPRECATED) can be used to specify the number of replicas for the legacy Zeebe Elasticsearch and OpenSearch exporter indices. Defaults to orchestration.index.replicas.

annotations.description: defines the ingress related annotations, consumed mostly by the ingress controller
can be used to define annotations, which will be applied to the service
can be used to define annotations, which will be applied to the headless service

deploymentStrategy.description: update strategy for the restapi Deployment. Defaults to RollingUpdate (zero-downtime), which only works when the PVC supports concurrent attach (RWX storage, or accessModes including ReadWriteMany). For chart-managed PVCs on RWO storage, set to "Recreate" to avoid Multi-Attach deadlocks during helm upgrade (introduces brief downtime per upgrade).
